title: Spirity Motion Blur
description: Ultra lightweight motion blur shader with zero FPS drop. Smooth visuals without performance loss.
body:
🎮 Spirity Motion Blur Shader

Spirity Motion Blur is a performance-friendly shader designed to give your Minecraft gameplay a smooth and cinematic feel without reducing FPS.

✨ Features:
• Smooth motion blur effect while moving
• No FPS drop (optimized for low-end devices)
• Clean and minimal visual enhancement
• Works perfectly for PvP and fast gameplay
• Compatible with Iris and OptiFine
• Supports Minecraft versions 1.21 to 1.21.11

⚡ Performance:
This shader is built for stability. Even on low-end devices, you can enjoy motion blur without lag or stutter.

🎯 Use Cases:
• PvP gameplay
• Smooth camera movement
• Cinematic recording
• Survival gameplay enhancement

🛠️ Installation:
1. Download the shader
2. Move it to .minecraft/shaderpacks/
3. Enable it from Video Settings → Shaders

⚠️ Note:
This shader focuses only on motion blur. It does not include heavy effects like reflections or ray tracing to ensure maximum performance.

👑 Credits:
Created by ItsAnshuXD
